ddls:
CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* FSA (Food Standards Agency) identifier for the establishment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the establishment */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the establishment */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the establishment */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate of the establishment */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate of the establishment */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the establishment */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the establishment */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local authority responsible for the establishment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of establishment */,
  "license_status" TEXT /* Current license status (e.g., Active, Suspended, Closed) */,
  "date_opened" TEXT /* Date the establishment opened */,
  "date_closed" TEXT /* Date the establishment closed (if applicable) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the establishment */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the establishment */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the establishment */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the establishment */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of customers the establishment can accommodate */,
  "alcohol_license" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the establishment has an alcohol license */,
  "food_license" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the establishment has a food license */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the establishment's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES establishment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the local authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the local authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the local authority */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the local authority */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the local authority is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the local authority is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the local authority is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the local authority's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., Routine, Follow-up) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inspection in minutes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inspection record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local authority the inspector works for */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the inspector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inspector's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Inspector, Public) */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local authority the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's record */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment the license is issued to */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Alcohol, Food) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or authority that issued the license */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the license is due for renewal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the license record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Pub, Cafe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the establishment type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment the application is for */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., New License, Renewal, Change of Ownership) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or authority that reviewed the application */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the application record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)
